channel.title: 番剧每日新闻RSS
channel.description: 自动聚合：新番、定档、PV、STAFF、CAST、延期资讯 | Auto-updated anime news aggregator

item.title: [动画][剧场版][PV][开播][公开] Anime News Network CloverWorks Omnibus 动画 Film Grotesqqque 公开 预告PV, Visual, 开播 Theme Song, November 6 Debut
